title: Knee Pain in Older Adults: 10 Herbal Teas for Natural Relief
description: Commiphora mukul teas, also known as guggul, has been traditionally used to help alleviate knee pain. The main reason it's effective is due to its anti-inflammatory properties, which help reduce swelling and pain in the joints. The tea contains a compound called guggulsterone, which has been shown to inhibit the production of pro-inflammatory enzymes, thus reducing inflammation and pain.  To try Commiphora mukul teas for knee pain, start by brewing a cup of tea using dried guggul leave...
